description_long: This bungalow features a modern, minimalist design with clean lines and a light-colored exterior, likely clad in vertical wooden siding. The roof is a prominent, steeply pitched gable style in dark material, with a central chimney and a smaller gabled entryway projecting from the front. Large windows dominate the rear facade, providing ample natural light and a connection to the outdoors, while the front includes a covered porch area with double doors and a single side window. The side elevations show a mix of window sizes, with the left side featuring a set of double doors and the right side a single window. The structure sits on a wooden deck that wraps partially around the building, enhancing its residential appeal. Overall, the bungalow exudes a contemporary Scandinavian influence, blending functionality with aesthetic simplicity.
description: A modern, light-colored bungalow with a steep gable roof, large rear windows, and a covered front porch on a wooden deck.
description_view_0: Front view showing the covered entry porch, double doors, and a single side window on a light vertical siding facade.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the gable end with two upper windows and the protruding entryway roof.
description_view_2: Rear view with a simple facade, a single window, and a chimney visible on the roof.
description_view_3: Back view dominated by large, symmetrical windows spanning the gable end and a partial view of the wooden deck.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped rear windows and varied side/front windows
